## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.10

### Cameras
- Delays Home Assistant WebRTC ICE candidate forwarding until after the X-Sense camera returns its SDP answer.
- Prevents the camera from receiving a burst of trickled ICE candidates before it has accepted the WebRTC offer.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC path unchanged otherwise, with no bridge, transcoding, or codec changes.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for queued WebRTC candidates staying queued until the camera answer is received.
- Confirms the full Python test suite passes with this change.
